courses.title: Noorani Qaida
courses.subtitle: A structured starting point for children and adults who want to build confident Quran reading skills from the basics.
courses.excerpt: Learn the fundamentals of Quran reading with proper pronunciation and letter recognition.
courses.introTitle: Start Quran Reading with the Right Foundation
intro: Noorani Qaida is the first step for beginners who want to learn Quran recitation correctly. It focuses on Arabic letters, pronunciation, and joining rules in a simple progression.
With one-to-one online guidance, students build fluency gradually and avoid mistakes early, making later Quran reading much easier and more accurate.

points.title: Arabic Letters and Sounds
points.text: Students learn each letter carefully with clear makharij and correct pronunciation from the start.

points.title: Joining and Reading Practice
points.text: Lessons move from individual letters to joined forms so learners can begin reading words confidently.

points.title: Basic Tajweed Awareness
points.text: Early recitation habits are improved with simple rules that prepare students for Quran reading.

points.title: Beginner-Friendly Pace
points.text: Classes are kept easy to follow for children, adults, and re-starters who need patient guidance.

courses.ctaTitle: Begin Noorani Qaida with Personal Guidance
courses.ctaText: Enroll in one-to-one online lessons and build a strong Quran reading foundation.

courses.subtitle: Understand the meanings, lessons, and guidance of the Quran through structured tafseer sessions with qualified tutors.
courses.excerpt: Understand the deeper meaning of Quranic verses with structured guidance from qualified tutors.
intro: Tafseer helps students understand the message of the Quran more deeply, including context, themes, and practical guidance for daily life.
This course is designed for learners who want both spiritual understanding and a clearer relationship with Quranic teachings.

points.title: Meaning of Verses
points.text: Students learn the message of selected surahs and ayat in a clear and accessible way.

points.title: Context and Background
points.text: Lessons explain when and why verses were revealed so their guidance is easier to understand.

points.title: Practical Lessons
points.text: Tafseer sessions connect Quranic guidance to daily life, character, and decision-making.

points.title: Structured Teacher Support

courses.ctaText: Start guided tafseer sessions and deepen your connection with Quranic meaning.

intro: Tajweed is essential for correct recitation. This course focuses on pronunciation, articulation points, and recitation rules that improve fluency and accuracy.
The course is suitable for students who want to correct common mistakes and build a stronger recitation standard with teacher supervision.

points.title: Rule-Based Recitation

articles.title: Benefits of Surah Kahf
articles.subtitle: A practical overview of why Surah Kahf holds a special place in weekly Islamic routine and reflection.
articles.excerpt: A practical guide to the virtues of Surah Kahf with Quran and Hadith references and why reciting it weekly matters.
articles.introTitle: Why Surah Kahf Matters Each Week
intro: Surah Kahf is widely recited on Fridays and is valued for the spiritual reminders, lessons, and protection associated with it in Islamic tradition.
Its stories help Muslims reflect on faith, patience, trials, leadership, and the temporary nature of worldly success.

points.title: Weekly Reminder of Faith
points.text: Reciting Surah Kahf each week helps renew spiritual focus and connect the heart to Quranic guidance.

points.title: Protection from Trials
points.text: The surah is often associated with reflection and preparation against major spiritual tests.

points.title: Powerful Quranic Stories
points.text: Its stories teach patience, humility, trust in Allah, and wisdom in difficult situations.

points.title: Consistent Quran Habit
points.text: A regular Friday recitation habit strengthens discipline and attachment to the Quran.

articles.ctaTitle: Learn the Quran with Meaningful Guidance
articles.ctaText: Explore more Islamic learning with structured Quran classes for children and adults.

articles.introTitle: Healthy and Meaningful Ramadan Eating Habits
intro: Sunnah foods offer both practical and spiritual value during fasting, especially at Sehri and Iftar when energy, balance, and simplicity matter most.
This topic helps students and families understand how prophetic food habits can shape a healthier and more intentional Ramadan routine.

points.title: Balanced Energy for Fasting
points.text: Simple and nourishing foods can help the body stay steadier during long fasting hours.

points.title: Connection to Sunnah
points.text: Following prophetic food habits adds spiritual intention to daily eating routines.

points.title: Healthier Meal Choices
points.text: Students and parents are encouraged to choose moderation, quality, and simplicity over excess.

points.title: Family Education Value
points.text: This topic helps children understand the wisdom of Islamic habits in everyday life.

articles.title: Difference Between Zakat, Sadaqah and Fitrana
articles.subtitle: A clear explanation of the main Islamic charity categories and when each one applies.
articles.excerpt: A simplified explanation of key Islamic charity terms to help students and parents understand them clearly.
intro: Many students and parents hear the terms Zakat, Sadaqah, and Fitrana together, but each one has a different purpose and ruling.
This topic explains the differences simply so families can better understand Islamic giving and teach it correctly to children.
articles.pointsTitle: How These Forms of Charity Differ

points.title: Zakat
points.text: Zakat is an obligatory annual charity due on qualifying wealth once the required threshold is met.

points.title: Sadaqah
points.text: Sadaqah is voluntary charity and can be given at any time for reward and support of others.

points.title: Fitrana
points.text: Fitrana is specifically linked to Ramadan and Eid, and it is given so the needy can benefit before Eid prayer.

points.title: Practical Family Understanding
points.text: Learning these distinctions helps children and adults apply Islamic charity more correctly and meaningfully.

articles.ctaText: Study Quran and Islamic education online with structured lessons for families and learners.
